chapters.title: Nuance And Register
chapters.objective: Develop flexible control over tone, precision, and audience awareness.

lessons.title: Adjust Register For Audience
lessons.goal: Say the same idea in formal, neutral, and conversational English.

exercises.prompt: Teach how to restate one message for a manager, friend, and client.
Have the learner restate a delay update for three different audiences.

success_criteria: Learner can produce distinct tones for different audiences.
Learner uses hedging and register control effectively.

review_rule.trigger: Review if audience adaptation remains flat across scenarios.

chapters.title: Advanced Speaking Performance
chapters.objective: Improve persuasive speaking, synthesis, and extended response control.

lessons.title: Lead A Complex Discussion
lessons.goal: Moderate a discussion, synthesize viewpoints, and propose a conclusion.

exercises.prompt: Run a discussion about product trade-offs and ask the learner to moderate it.
Ask the learner to summarize the discussion and propose a decision.

success_criteria: Learner can state a conclusion with rationale.

review_rule.trigger: Review if synthesis or signposting breaks down in long responses.
